redshift.z_floor_reason: KCWI BL throughput floor is 3700 A; Lya at z<2.04 falls below this. Using 2.05 for margin.

science_goal: UV-luminous QSOs with no known extended Lya emission, suitable for KCWI IFU follow-up
literature_focus: extended Lya emission, Lya nebula, Lya halo, Lyman-alpha blob, LAB, LAH, IFU spectroscopy, integral field, CGM emission, circumgalactic medium
